description_long: This object is a rectangular, black electronic device with a layered, ribbed front panel and a smooth top surface featuring a blue and green stylized 'PS2' logo. The front face includes two memory card slots, controller ports, and several small round buttons, as well as a multicolored PlayStation logo. The right side panel has a vented grille and multiple labeled ports, including digital and AV outputs, as well as a power switch. The rear and left sides are mostly featureless, with subtle venting and structural details. The overall construction appears to be primarily plastic with some internal metal components for structural support and electronics. The device is compact and designed to sit horizontally on a flat surface, suitable for placement in entertainment centers or on shelves.
description: A black, rectangular PlayStation 2 console with a ribbed front panel, blue-green logo, and multiple ports and buttons on the front and side.
description_view_0: The top view shows the smooth black surface with the blue-green 'PS2' logo prominently displayed.
description_view_1: The right side view reveals the vented grille, labeled ports, and power switch, highlighting the device's connectivity options.
description_view_2: The rear view is mostly plain, showing the solid back panel with minimal features and subtle venting.
description_view_3: The front view displays the ribbed panel, memory card slots, controller ports, PlayStation logo, and several control buttons.
